lineup_source: Côte d'Ivoire vs Germany, Group E, 20 June 2026

players.name: Yahia Fofana
players.note: Born in France and capped by French youth teams, but is 'of Ivorian descent' through his parents.

players.name: Ghislain Konan
players.note: No documented birthplace or parental origin found; assumed homegrown Ivorian.

players.name: Wilfried Singo
players.note: Youth product of Denguélé academy in Ivory Coast; no documented parental origin found.

players.name: Odilon Kossounou
players.note: Began career at ASEC Mimosas academy in Abidjan; no documented parental origin found.

players.name: Emmanuel Agbadou
players.note: No documented birthplace or parental origin found; assumed homegrown Ivorian.

players.name: Franck Kessié
players.note: Born in Ouragahio, Ivory Coast; began career at Stella Club d'Adjamé. No documented parental origin.

players.name: Ibrahim Sangaré
players.note: Started youth career with Ivorian clubs Tout Puissant Koumassi and AS Denguélé; no documented parental origin.

players.name: Christ Inao Oulaï
players.note: Joined JMG Academy in Ivory Coast at age 12; no documented birthplace or parental origin.

players.name: Ange-Yoan Bonny
players.note: Born in France and played for French youth teams up to U21, but is documented as 'of Ivorian descent'.

players.name: Yan Diomandé
players.note: Born in Abidjan, Ivory Coast; moved to the United States as a teenager for school and football.

players.name: Amad Diallo
players.note: Born in Abidjan, Ivory Coast; emigrated to Italy at age eight to join Atalanta's academy pathway.
